name: VNC Lateral Movement
description: Detects VNC connections used for lateral movement within the network
query:
// Detect VNC connections between internal hosts
// Trigger on internal-to-internal VNC traffic
events from ndr_flow
where destination_port >= 5900
  and destination_port <= 5910
  and direction = "internal"
group by source_ip, destination_ip
having count(*) > 3
within 300 seconds
